description: Starter kit template library seed manifest

workflows.name: Template - Local Ollama Chat
workflows.notes: LangChain chat UI backed by local Ollama. Requires Ollama reachable and model pulled (e.g. llama3.2:3b).

workflows.name: Template - Supabase API Health Check
workflows.notes: Webhook calls Kong auth health from inside the Docker network (plus an Execute Workflow entry point for sub-workflows). No stored Supabase credentials required beyond the anon JWT headers already in the template.

workflows.name: Template - Document Ingest + Query
workflows.notes: RAG ingest and query webhooks backed by pgvector match_documents (`volumes/db/vector.sql`, `match_documents.sql`).

workflows.name: Template - NodeBot Builder
workflows.notes: Chat Hub workflow agent backed by Ollama and the n8n instance-level MCP server. Requires MCP enabled and an MCP access token.

workflows.name: SK - Create Greeting Workflow
workflows.notes: Sub-workflow used by NodeBot Builder Call n8n Workflow Tool for reliable Manual Trigger + Set hello demos.

workflows.name: SK - Create Webhook Workflow
workflows.notes: NodeBot Builder helper: creates a POST webhook with a Set node that normalizes/echoes the payload.

workflows.name: SK - Create Scheduled Workflow
workflows.notes: NodeBot Builder helper: creates a Schedule Trigger + Set workflow from a 5-field cron expression.

workflows.name: SK - List Workflows
workflows.notes: NodeBot Builder helper: wraps MCP search_workflows so the chat agent can list/describe workflows in one tool call.

workflows.name: SK - Create RAG Workflow
workflows.notes: Builder helper: clones the Document Ingest + Query template and parameterizes ingest/query paths plus description via MCP-driven create.

workflows.name: SK - Update Workflow
workflows.notes: Fetch workflow via MCP get_workflow_details, linearize to Workflow SDK, validate implicitly through update_workflow, and apply name/description patches. Toggle active with SK - Activate/Deactivate.

workflows.name: SK - Activate Deactivate Workflow
workflows.notes: Confirms the workflow exists via get_workflow_details then calls publish_workflow or unpublish_workflow for true/false toggles.

workflows.name: SK - Delete Workflow
workflows.notes: Safety-gated archive via MCP archive_workflow (confirmToken must match id, protected kit IDs blocked).

workflows.name: SK - Create Supabase Row Trigger Workflow
workflows.notes: Creates Postgres Trigger + Set workflow via MCP validate/create. Configure Postgres credentials (`PostgresStarter001` placeholder) before activating.

workflows.name: SK - Starter Kit Status
workflows.notes: Read-only status: MCP workflow search + Kong GET + optional Code-node Ollama `/api/tags` fetch when $helpers is enabled.

workflows.name: Template - AI Starter Console
workflows.notes: Slimmer chat agent: List_Workflows + Starter_Kit_Status + Supabase health Execute Workflow tools. No MCP client tool.

workflows.name: Template - Starter Kit Index
workflows.notes: Read-only JSON catalog of seeded templates, builder helpers, Chat Hub agents, and local URLs. GET /webhook/template-kit-index.

workflows.name: SK - Record AI Call
workflows.notes: Sub-workflow inserts one row into public.ai_calls via Kong PostgREST (anon JWT bundled with other templates).

credentialSetup.name: Local Ollama API
credentialSetup.setup: Create in n8n UI if not imported: base URL http://ollama:11434 (container) or http://host.docker.internal:11434 (host Ollama).

credentialSetup.name: n8n MCP Access Token
credentialSetup.setup: scripts/setup.sh generates the token from the first n8n owner account and updates this credential automatically. If no owner exists yet, create the first n8n account and re-run npm run setup.
